benefits.description: Strong sustained erection with ability to have multiple rounds (6-7) over several hours. Kicks in at 9-10pm after 4pm and 9-10pm dosing; maintains into next morning (ready again by 8am).
Rapid refractory period; able to get hard again within minutes even after quick rounds.

side_effects.description: Nausea lasting 45 minutes to 1 hour after dosing

protocol_notes: Male, 45 years old. Takes 1.5-2mg PT-141 around 4pm and 9-10pm. Has used for 8 years. Manages nausea with Pepto-Bismol taken before dosing and ginger chews. Also uses blue pill (sildenafil). Incorporates Delta 9 cannabis. Protocol shows 6-7 days/week sexual frequency (~10-14 ejaculations per week). Premature ejaculation that developed in mid-30s resolved through combination of PT-141, testosterone optimization, and increased sexual frequency.
